body:
# **Welcome!**

Welcome to the Beslandia Mod!

In this mod, some new ores, tools, weapons, and blocks have been added

In future versions, more content will be added to this mod. Stay tuned!

# New Ores

## Orchium

The orchium ore will be generated in the 0-64 layers of the overworld, and its alloy ingots have better strength and performance than the netherite

## Magoldium

The magoldium ore will be generated on the 16-32 layers of the nether, requiring pickaxe excavation of orchium or above

## Errorium

The errorium ore is usually generated in the top or bottom bedrock layer of the nether, and its material is exceptionally strong. More uses will be added in future versions!
